discrepancies.description: Registrant appears in both event_registration_platform and newsletter_opt_in with different preferred_language values
Set of newsletter opt in registrants registered for the event but did not confirm language preference on the event platform
Event registration platform count exceeds the newsletter cross list count by 18 records that appear only on the event platform side
Bengali language interpretation requests exceed the language support planning assumption of 8 booth capacity

capacity_notes.note: Current registrations exceed venue capacity by roughly 18 percent before walk in estimate. Historical walk in ratio is approximately 30 percent of registered. Actual room load is expected to exceed seated capacity. Overflow protocol and streaming to secondary room recommended.
